user_token.description: Metricool user token, sent as the X-Mc-Auth header on every request. Never logged.

base_url.description: Metricool API base URL override for tests or proxies.

user_id.description: Metricool account userId, sent as the userId query parameter on every request.

blog_ids.description: Comma-separated list of Metricool blogId values to fan out over for the instagram_posts, facebook_posts, linkedin_posts, and tiktok_posts streams (Metricool's analytics API is not paginated; each blog is a separate request). Required for those four streams (no auto-discovery fallback); the brands stream is account-wide and unaffected.

start_date.description: Optional lower bound of the analytics date range. instagram_posts/facebook_posts/linkedin_posts (Metricool's /stats/* endpoints) expect YYYYMMDD (e.g. 20260101); tiktok_posts (the /v2/analytics endpoint) expects YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS (e.g. 2026-01-01T00:00:00). Supply the value already formatted for the stream being read; the engine sends it verbatim with no reformatting.

end_date.description: Optional upper bound of the analytics date range, same per-stream format rules as start_date.
